text_block_list.name: Mysterious Voice
text_block_list.text: Open your eyes...

text_block_list.name: Mysterious Voice
text_block_list.text:
Now jump, and shout... Ah, make<n>sure your light
stick matches your<n>fav's color...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Whew! Everyone having a blast?<n>Enjoying our
duo concert?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're finally awake, sleepyhead.<n>☆ C'mon,
start waving your light<n>stick!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! We finally made it to this arena!<n>The
glamorous stage, the stands filled<n>with lights—it's
all ours, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
But we can get farther away yet. I<n>propose a new
goal. Next, our front<n>running will take us to...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Outer space.

text_block_list.name: Fans Floating in Space
text_block_list.text:
Yooo! It's the Runaway Sisters! This<n>is awesome!
Holy moly!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Riiiing!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Aw, that bell means our time together<n>is up!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Why don't we just run away until we<n>can't hear
it anymore?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Good point. After all, leading the pack<n>where no
one's gone before is what<n>we do!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: That's right, 'cause we're the...

text_block_list.name: Falco & Friends
text_block_list.text: Runaway Sisters! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Riiiing!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Good morning, Trainer! So today...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hello, hello! This the studio we're<n>using today?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Heyo! I'm here, just like you asked!<n>Tada!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Umm... Hello.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
As you can see, I asked everyone<n>here if we
could practice together<n>today! Because, well...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Uh, Trainer? Are you... okay? You look<n>like you're
having a revelation or<n>something.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Anyways, we're about to get started,<n>so c'mon,
pay attention! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
When us five harmonize, it's<n>legendary! You'll
give us a listen,<n>right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I listen to the five of them sing, and<n>the harmony is
as pleasing as Smart<n>Falcon promised.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Forming a unit to practice with might<n>be good for
<chrname>...
